name: Pastor Charles Muchemi
bio: Pastor Charles Muchemi is the visionary leader of Royal Priesthood Embassy. His teaching on Kingdom Embassy theology, ambassador identity, and sonship has transformed lives across Kenya and beyond.

name: Mark Mwangi
bio: Mark Mwangi serves as Ministry Director, overseeing discipleship pathways and teaching ministry with deep exposition of the Word.

name: Salome Waruguru
bio: Salome Waruguru leads the finance ministry with integrity and excellence, ensuring faithful stewardship of resources for Kingdom advancement.

name: Lucy Auma
bio: Lucy Auma serves as Ministry Director, passionate about teaching faith as a heart response to the Word.

name: Mercy Zawadi
bio: Mercy Zawadi leads ministry initiatives focused on devotion, worship, and guarding spiritual hunger.

name: Mary Wamuyu
bio: Mary Wamuyu serves in ministry leadership with a heart for consecration and worship.

name: Gloria Kimaru
bio: Gloria Kimaru leads the hospitality team, ensuring every visitor feels welcomed and at home.
